header.title: La Halle au Blé à Bréhal.jpg
header.description: The Halle au Blé de Bréhal is the emblematic monument of the town. The current building, built in 1884 by the architect Paul Héneux, was completely renovated in 2020 and houses the Tourist Office and a large hall for meetings or exhibitions.
header.author: Jean-Charles BOSSARD, Conseiller municipal de Bréhal
